name: Francisco Partners
overview: Tech-specialist buyout firm with multiple fund strategies spanning large-cap, middle-market, and credit. Known for complex carve-outs from large strategics and divestiture-driven origination — pattern that benefits from sales-engineering pattern recognition on enterprise software stacks.
notable: Long track record of carve-outs from public technology companies
bdNotes: Carve-out / divestiture sourcing is a real BD muscle here; a thesis pitched as 'I think [strategic] is going to divest [unit] within 18 months because of X' tracks well to their playbook.
